name: Wildflower Palace
description: A luxury colonial-style retreat nestled high in pine and cedar forests, offering magnificent views of the snow-clad peaks.

name: Solang River Heights
description: A premium alpine chalet perched beside the rushing river, perfect for adventure seekers who value luxury.

name: Spiti Oasis Retreat
description: An authentic, eco-friendly retreat constructed in traditional mud-brick style, offering comfortable sanctuary in the high-altitude cold desert.

name: Tirthan River Whispers
description: A cozy riverside wood-and-stone cottage offering deep peace, forest walks, and personal trout-fishing access.

name: Dhauladhar Vista Resort
description: Unwind at this wellness-focused resort offering stunning panoramic views of the Dhauladhar range and daily yoga classes.

name: Kinner Kailash Cottages
description: Exquisite cottages facing the legendary Kinner Kailash peak, situated directly within lush apple orchards.

name: Barot Trout Heights Lodge
description: A quiet mountain retreat surrounded by tall cedar trees, featuring direct access to trout-fishing spots.

name: Chamba Palace Heritage
description: A beautifully restored royal residency showcasing classic Chamba timber architecture and traditional carvings.

name: Parvati Woods Glamping
description: Premium geodesic dome tents perched high in pine woods, overlooking the white waters of the Parvati River.

name: Hatu Peak Alpine Resort
description: Luxury alpine stone-and-wood resort in Narkanda with slanted shingle roofs and private balconies overlooking Hatu peak.

name: Jibhi Treehouse Eco-Resort
description: A premium luxury wooden treehouse cabin suspended high in a dense pine forest, offering stunning mountain views and rustic peace.

name: Dalhousie Pine View Manor
description: A luxury heritage stone manor overlooking misty pine valleys, featuring colonial shingle architecture and panoramic views.

name: Rohtang Heights Dome Stay
description: A premium geodesic dome tent stay nestled on a green hill, offering magnificent views of the snow-clad Rohtang peaks.

name: Mashobra Pine Forest Lodge
description: A luxury wooden forest lodge surrounded by tall pine trees, featuring cozy fire hearths and private balconies.

name: Dharamkot Art Homestay
description: An artistic, brick-walled homestay surrounded by oak trees, offering a peaceful library and climbing-vine balconies.

name: Langza Mudhouse Homestay
description: A traditional mud-brick homestay in Spiti's fossil village Langza, featuring clay brick construction and high-altitude mountain views.

name: Tosh Village Wooden Cabin
description: A cozy, rustic wooden mountain cabin in Tosh, offering stunning ridge views of glacial streams and pine valleys.

name: Uhl River Riverside Camps
description: Riverside dome camping on the grassy bank of Uhl River, featuring trout-fishing access and evening campfires.

name: Shimla Ridge View Castle
description: A luxury heritage stone castle near Mall Road, featuring grand colonial architecture and private flower terrace views.

name: Solang Glacial Chalet
description: A luxury wood-and-glass A-frame alpine chalet in Solang Valley, offering panoramic glacial peak views from glass walls.

name: Triund Mountain Dome Camp
description: High-altitude luxury safari dome camps situated on the Triund Ridge directly below the giant Dhauladhar mountain face.

name: Kibber Canyon Mudhouse
description: A premium high-altitude mudhouse lodge in Kibber, featuring classic Tibetan window carvings facing deep mountain canyons.

name: Chalal Pine Riverside Lodge
description: A luxury glass-and-wood cabin perched directly on the bank of the rushing Parvati River, surrounded by tall deodar woods.

name: GHNP Cedar Eco-Cabin
description: An eco-friendly stone and cedar wood cabin inside the Great Himalayan National Park forest, situated right beside the roaring river.

name: Kufri Snow Vista Lodge
description: A beautiful alpine lodge in Kufri offering panoramic views of snowy ridges and high-altitude coniferous forests.

name: Old Manali Woods Cabin
description: A cozy, historic wooden cabin located deep in the pine woods near Hadimba Temple, with wood-fired hearths.

name: Shoja Hamlet Pine Retreat
description: Unwind in a quiet wooden hamlet surrounded by thick pine woods, offering panoramic views of the entire Tirthan Valley.

name: Palampur Tea Estate Lodge
description: A premium boutique lodge situated in Palampur's lush tea gardens, offering guided tea-tasting sessions.

name: Rewalsar Lake View Homestay
description: A peaceful homestay overlooking the sacred Rewalsar Lake, holy to Buddhists, Hindus, and Sikhs.

name: Jispa Riverside Dome Camps
description: High-altitude riverside dome camping in Jispa, Lahaul Valley, offering stone cottages and scenic star trail stargazing.

name: Sangla Apple Orchard Glamping
description: A premium glamping site set directly within a golden apple orchard in Sangla Valley, facing snow-capped peaks.

name: Kalpa Castle Heritage Resort
description: Experience royal hospitality in a boutique heritage hotel styled after Kinnauri wooden castles, overlooking the sacred Kinner Kailash peak.

name: Khajjiar Swiss Meadows Chalet
description: An exquisite wood-and-stone chalet perched on the edge of the famous Khajjiar meadow, surrounded by towering deodar forests.

name: Bharmour Chaurasi View Homestay
description: A cozy, traditional homestay in Bharmour offering organic local meals and clear views of the ancient 7th-century Chaurasi stone temples.

name: Manikaran Spiritual Springs Lodge
description: Relax in a comfortable riverfront lodge featuring private hot spring baths and views of the rushing Parvati River and Manikaran Sahib.

name: Naggar Timber Heritage Castle
description: A beautifully preserved heritage boutique hotel constructed in classic Kathkuni architecture, showcasing traditional woodwork and panoramas of Kullu valley.

name: Nako Lake Side Homestay
description: A peaceful mudhouse homestay situated right on the banks of Nako Lake, offering warm hospitality, butter tea, and Tibetan bread.

name: Prashar Lake Stargazing Camps
description: Luxury weather-resistant dome camps pitched on the ridges near the sacred Prashar Lake, offering crystal-clear night skies for stargazing.

name: Jalori Pass Trekker Cabin
description: A rustic A-frame cabin located near Jalori Pass, providing an ideal base camp for treks to Serolsar Lake and Raghupur Fort.

name: Bir Billing Aero Glamping
description: Premium safari tents located near the paragliding landing site in Bir, featuring an evening campfire and guided tandem flying coordination.
